title: Leader Zombie Tweaks
description: [OBSOLETE] Appearance & stat changes to leader zombies, addon to Zombie Improvements
body:
**This mod is no longer necessary, as its features have been implemented in [the base mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/zombieimprovements).**

---

This mod provides further tweaks to leader zombies as an addon to [Zombie Improvements](https://modrinth.com/mod/zombieimprovements).

Changes:
- Instead of having a red aura, leader zombies have a unique texture and are slightly larger
- Leader zombies have different sounds
- Leader zombies have a bit more attack damage
- Leader zombies have "Leader" added to their names (visible in commands, death messages, and mods that use it like health viewers)

Made for a request on the Fabric discord server. Uses sounds from Minecraft Dungeons.
